---
title: The making of the lollipop chart, in R and Python
subtitle: AE 16
---

# R version

```{r}
#| message: false
#| eval: false
library(tidyverse)

df_r <- read_csv("data/mean-area-decade.csv")

# add code here
```

# Python version

```{python}
#| eval: false
import polars as pl
from plotnine import ggplot, aes, geom_point, geom_segment, labs, theme, theme_minimal

df_py = pl.read_csv("data/mean-area-decade.csv")

# add code here
```
